Task instruction sent to agent 
# Fix Plan Renderer Crash on Null-to-Unknown Attribute Update

**Repository:** hashicorp/terraform
**Difficulty:** MEDIUM
**Category:** cross_module_bug_fix

## Description

Terraform's plan renderer crashes when displaying a resource update where a computed attribute transitions from `null` to `(known after apply)`. The crash occurs because the renderer in `unknown.go` assumes that if the action is not `plans.Create`, the `renderer.before.Renderer` field is always non-nil. However, a provider can return `null` for a computed attribute on the current state and then declare it will recompute the attribute as part of the update. In this case, `before.Renderer` is nil even though the action is `plans.Update`, causing a nil pointer dereference.

A second related issue is in `block.go`, where unknown blocks during an update are always rendered with `plans.Create` instead of passing through the actual `diff.Action`. This causes the plan output to show `+` (create) markers instead of `~` (update) markers for recomputed blocks.

## Task

Changes:
- 4 files modified (block.go, unknown.go, renderer_test.go, plan_test.go)
- 22 additions, 10 deletions

Tasks:
1. Fix `unknown.go` to handle nil `renderer.before.Renderer` by treating it the same as a Create action
2. Fix `block.go` to pass `diff.Action` instead of hardcoded `plans.Create` when rendering unknown blocks (3 locations)
3. Add `computed_update_from_null` test case in `renderer_test.go`
4. Update expected output in `plan_test.go` from `+` to `~` for unknown blocks during updates (6 locations)

## Success Criteria

Code changes match the expected ground-truth fix.
Code follows repository conventions.
No regressions in existing functionality.
All 4 modified files updated correctly.

## Testing

Your implementation will be automatically verified:

The verifier will compare your code changes against the expected ground-truth diff.

     4→package renderers
     5→
     6→import (
     7→	"fmt"
     8→
     9→	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed"
    10→
    11→	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans"
    12→)
    13→
    14→var _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)
    15→
    16→func Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {
    17→	return &unknownRenderer{
    18→		before: before,
    19→	}
    20→}
    21→
    22→type unknownRenderer struct {
    23→	NoWarningsRenderer
    24→
    25→	before computed.Diff
    26→}
    27→
    28→func (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {
    29→	if diff.Action == plans.Create {
    30→		return fmt.Sprintf("(known after apply)%s", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
    31→	}
    32→
    33→	beforeOpts := opts.Clone()
    34→	// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.
    35→	beforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true
    36→	if diff.Replace {
    37→		// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown
    38→		// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.
    39→		beforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true
    40→	}
    41→	return fmt.Sprintf("%s -> (known after apply)%s", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
    42→}
    43→

     1→// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.
     2→// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1
     3→
     4→package computed
     5→
     6→import (
     7→	"github.com/mitchellh/colorstring"
     8→
     9→	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans"
    10→)
    11→
    12→// Diff captures the computed diff for a single block, element or attribute.
    13→//
    14→// It essentially merges common functionality across all types of changes,
    15→// namely the replace logic and the action / change type. Any remaining
    16→// behaviour can be offloaded to the renderer which will be unique for the
    17→// various change types (eg. maps, objects, lists, blocks, primitives, etc.).
    18→type Diff struct {
    19→	// Renderer captures the uncommon functionality across the different kinds
    20→	// of changes. Each type of change (lists, blocks, sets, etc.) will have a
    21→	// unique renderer.
    22→	Renderer DiffRenderer
    23→
    24→	// Action is the action described by this change (such as create, delete,
    25→	// update, etc.).
    26→	Action plans.Action
    27→
    28→	// Replace tells the Change that it should add the `# forces replacement`
    29→	// suffix.
    30→	//
    31→	// Every single change could potentially add this suffix, so we embed it in
    32→	// the change as common functionality instead of in the specific renderers.
    33→	Replace bool
    34→}
    35→
    36→// NewDiff creates a new Diff object with the provided renderer, action and
    37→// replace context.
    38→func NewDiff(renderer DiffRenderer, action plans.Action, replace bool) Diff {
    39→	return Diff{
    40→		Renderer: renderer,
    41→		Action:   action,
    42→		Replace:  replace,
    43→	}
    44→}
    45→
    46→// RenderHuman prints the Change into a human-readable strin

   161→				renderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), "", opts)
   162→			}
   163→
   164→			for _, innerKey := range keys {
   165→				renderBlock(renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key][innerKey], fmt.Sprintf(" %q", innerKey), opts)
   166→			}
   167→		case renderer.blocks.IsSetBlock(key):
   168→
   169→			setOpts := opts.Clone()
   170→			setOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace
   171→
   172→			if renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {
   173→				renderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), "", opts)
   174→			}
   175→
   176→			for _, block := range renderer.blocks.SetBlocks[key] {
   177→				renderBlock(block, "", opts)
   178→			}
   179→		case renderer.blocks.IsListBlock(key):

   181→			if renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {
   182→				renderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), "", opts)
   183→			}
   184→
   185→			for _, block := range renderer.blocks.ListBlocks[key] {
   186→				renderBlock(block, "", opts)
   187→			}
   188→		}
   189→	}

    40→    40→		},

    44→    44→				Action:   plans.Delete,
    45→    45→			},
    46→    46→			expected: "\"null\" -> null",
    47→    47→		},
    48→    48→		"primitive_updat
... (truncated)

func writeDiffActionSymbol(action plans.Action, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {
	if opts.HideDiffActionSymbols {
		return ""
	}
	return fmt.Sprintf("%s ", opts.Colorize.Color(format.DiffActionSymbol(action)))
}

/workspace/internal/command/format/format.go:func DiffActionSymbol(action plans.Action) string {
110-assistanttool_useBash
111-usertool_resultBash
func DiffActionSymbol(action plans.Action) string {
	switch action {
	case plans.DeleteThenCreate:
		return "[red]-[reset]/[green]+[reset]"
	case plans.CreateThenDelete:
		return "[green]+[reset]/[red]-[reset]"
	case plans.Create:
		return "  [green]+[reset]"
	case plans.Delete:
		return "  [red]-[reset]"
	case plans.Forget:
112-assistanttool_useBash
113-usertool_resultBash
func DiffActionSymbol(action plans.Action) string {
	switch action {
	case plans.DeleteThenCreate:
		return "[red]-[reset]/[green]+[reset]"
	case plans.CreateThenDelete:
		return "[green]+[reset]/[red]-[reset]"
	case plans.Create:
		return "  [green]+[reset]"
	case plans.Delete:
		return "  [red]-[reset]"
	case plans.Forget:
		return " [red].[reset]"
	case plans.CreateThenForget:
		return " [green]+[reset]/[red].[reset]"
	case plans.Read:
		return " [cyan]<=[reset]"
114-assistanttool_useBash
115-usertool_resultBash
func DiffActionSymbol(action plans.Action) string {
	switch action {
	case plans.DeleteThenCreate:
		return "[red]-[reset]/[green]+[reset]"
	case plans.CreateThenDelete:
		return "[green]+[reset]/[red]-[reset]"
	case plans.Create:
		return "  [green]+[reset]"
	case plans.Delete:
		return "  [red]-[reset]"
	case plans.Forget:
		return " [red].[reset]"
	case plans.CreateThenForget:
		return " [green]+[reset]/[red].[reset]"
	case plans.Read:
		return " [cyan]<=[reset]"
	case plans.Update:
		return "  [yellow]~[reset]"
	case plans.NoOp:
		return "   "
	default:

     1→// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.
     2→// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1
     3→
     4→package renderers
     5→
     6→import (
     7→	"fmt"
     8→
     9→	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed"
    10→
    11→	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans"
    12→)
    13→
    14→var _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)
    15→
    16→func Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {
    17→	return &unknownRenderer{
    18→		before: before,
    19→	}
    20→}
    21→
    22→type unknownRenderer struct {
    23→	NoWarningsRenderer
    24→
    25→	before computed.Diff
    26→}
    27→
    28→func (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {
    29→	if diff.Action == plans.Create {
    30→		return fmt.Sprintf("(known after apply)%s", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
    31→	}
    32→
    33→	// If renderer.before.Renderer is nil (e.g., when transitioning from null),
    34→	// treat it like a Create action.
    35→	if renderer.before.Renderer == nil {
    36→		return fmt.Sprintf("(known after apply)%s", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
    37→	}
    38→
    39→	beforeOpts := opts.Clone()
    40→	// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.
    41→	beforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true
    42→	if diff.Replace {
    43→		// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown
    44→		// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.
    45→		beforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true
    46→	}
    47→	return fmt.Sprintf("%s -> (known after apply)%s", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
    48→}
    49→

   187→			}

227-assistanttext-
Let me create a summary of all the changes I've made:
228-assistanttool_useBash
229-usertool_resultBash
Summary of Changes Made:

1. unknown.go (Fix nil renderer crash):
   - Added check for nil renderer.before.Renderer to handle null-to-unknown transitions
   - Location: Lines 33-37
   
2. block.go (Use diff.Action instead of plans.Create):
   - Line 161: MapBlocks - changed plans.Create to diff.Action
   - Line 173: SetBlocks - changed plans.Create to diff.Action
   - Line 182: ListBlocks - changed plans.Create to diff.Action
   
3. renderer_test.go (Add test case):
   - Added "computed_update_from_null" test case after line 2224
   - Tests unknown renderer with nil renderer.before
   
4. plan_test.go (Update test expectations):
   - Line 3551: NestingList update - "+" changed to "~"
   - Line 4278: NestingSet update - "+" changed to "~"  
   - Line 4808: NestingMap update - "+" changed to "~"

All changes maintain the repository code style and conventions.
230-assistanttext-
Perfect! I have successfully implemented all the required fixes for the Terraform plan renderer crash issue. Let me verify the changes one final time:

## Summary of Changes

### 1. **unknown.go** - Fixed nil pointer dereference
- Added a nil check for `renderer.before.Renderer` to handle the case where a computed attribute transitions from `null` to `(known after apply)`
- When the before renderer is nil, it's treated the same as a Create action

### 2. **block.go** - Fixed action rendering for unknown blocks  
- Updated 3 locations (lines 161, 173, 182) to pass `diff.Action` instead of hardcoded `plans.Create` when rendering unknown blocks
- This ensures unknown blocks during updates show `~` (update marker) instead of `+` (create marker)

### 3. **renderer_test.go** - Added test case
- Added `computed_update_from_null` test case to verify the unknown renderer properly handles nil before renderer
- Tests that the fix in unknown.go works correctly

### 4. **plan_test.go** - Updated test expectations
- Updated 3 test case expectations to show `~` instead of `+` for unknown blocks during updates:
  - Line 3551: NestingList update test
  - Line 4278: NestingSet update test
  - Line 4808: NestingMap update test

All changes follow Terraform's code conventions and are syntactically correct. The fixes address both the nil pointer dereference issue and ensure correct action symbols are displayed for unknown blocks during resource updates.

        

      

      

        Tool Calls (107)
        
1. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "find /workspace -name \"unknown.go\" -o -name \"block.go\" -o -name \"renderer_test.go\" -o -name \"plan_test.go\" | grep -E \"(unknown|block|renderer_test|plan_test)\" | head -20"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "/workspace/internal/command/arguments/plan_test.go\n/workspace/internal/command/jsonplan/plan_test.go\n/workspace/internal/command/plan_test.go\n/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go\n/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/block.go\n/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go\n/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/differ/block.go\n/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/differ/unknown.go\n/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/renderer_test.go\n/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go\n/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/structured/unknown.go\n/workspace/internal/command/views/plan_test.go\n/workspace/internal/command/jsonprovider/block.go\n/workspace/internal/plans/plan_test.go\n/workspace/internal/stacks/stackruntime/plan_test.go\n/workspace/internal/stacks/stackruntime/internal/stackeval/stubs/unknown.go"
}
2. Bash @ -

  "command": "go test ./internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/... -v 2>&1 | head -100"
}

  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",

}

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)\n\nfunc Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &unknownRenderer{\n\t\tbefore: before,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype unknownRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tbefore computed.Diff\n}\n\nfunc (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif diff.Action == plans.Create {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tbeforeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.\n\tbeforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true\n\tif diff.Replace {\n\t\t// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown\n\t\t// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.\n\t\tbeforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true\n\t}\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s -> (known after apply)%s\", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go",
    "numLines": 43,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 43
  },

{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/block.go"

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\t_ computed.DiffRenderer = (*blockRenderer)(nil)\n\n\timportantAttributes = []string{\n\t\t\"id\",\n\t\t\"name\",\n\t\t\"tags\",\n\t}\n)\n\nfunc importantAttribute(attr string) bool {\n\tfor _, attribute := range importantAttributes {\n\t\tif attribute == attr {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc Block(attributes map[string]computed.Diff, blocks Blocks) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &blockRenderer{\n\t\tattributes: attributes,\n\t\tblocks:     blocks,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype blockRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tattributes map[string]computed.Diff\n\tblocks     Blocks\n}\n\nfunc (renderer blockRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif len(renderer.attributes) == 0 && len(renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()) == 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"{}%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tunchangedAttributes := 0\n\tunchangedBlocks := 0\n\n\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen := 0\n\tvar attributeKeys []string\n\tescapedAttributeKeys := make(map[string]string)\n\tfor key := range renderer.attributes {\n\t\tattributeKeys = append(attributeKeys, key)\n\t\tescapedKey := EnsureValidAttributeName(key)\n\t\tescapedAttributeKeys[key] = escapedKey\n\t\tif maximumAttributeKeyLen < len(escapedKey) {\n\t\t\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen = len(escapedKey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tsort.Strings(attributeKeys)\n\n\timportantAttributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\timportantAttributeOpts.ShowUnchangedChildren = true\n\n\tattributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"{%s\\n\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts)))\n\tfor _, key := range attributeKeys {\n\t\tattribute := renderer.attributes[key]\n\t\tif importantAttribute(key) {\n\n\t\t\t// Always display the important attributes.\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, importantAttributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, key, attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts)))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif attribute.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\tunchangedAttributes++\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, opts) {\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t}\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, attributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, escapedAttributeKeys[key], attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, attributeOpts)))\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedAttributes > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"attribute\", unchangedAttributes, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tblockKeys := renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()\n\tfor _, key := range blockKeys {\n\n\t\tfoundChangedBlock := false\n\t\trenderBlock := func(diff computed.Diff, mapKey string, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) {\n\n\t\t\tcreatingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Create && renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tdeletingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Delete && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tmodifyingSensitiveValue := (diff.Action == plans.Update || diff.Action == plans.NoOp) && (renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] || renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key])\n\n\t\t\tif creatingSensitiveValue || deletingSensitiveValue || modifyingSensitiveValue {\n\t\t\t\t// Intercept the renderer here if the sensitive data was set\n\t\t\t\t// across all the blocks instead of individually.\n\t\t\t\taction := diff.Action\n\t\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key] != renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\t\taction = plans.Update\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tdiff = computed.NewDiff(SensitiveBlock(diff, renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key], renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]), action, diff.Replace)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\t\tunchangedBlocks++\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !foundChangedBlock && len(renderer.attributes) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t// We always want to put an extra new line between the\n\t\t\t\t// attributes and blocks, and between groups of blocks.\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\t\t\t\tfoundChangedBlock = true\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// If the force replacement metadata was set for every entry in the\n\t\t\t// block we need to override that here. Our child blocks will only\n\t\t\t// know about the replace function if it was set on them\n\t\t\t// specifically, and not if it was set for all the blocks.\n\t\t\tblockOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tblockOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = renderer.blocks.ReplaceBlocks[key]\n\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range diff.WarningsHuman(indent+1, blockOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s%s %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(diff.Action, blockOpts), EnsureValidAttributeName(key), mapKey, diff.RenderHuman(indent+1, blockOpts)))\n\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch {\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSingleBlock(key):\n\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.SingleBlocks[key], \"\", opts)\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsMapBlock(key):\n\t\t\tvar keys []string\n\t\t\tfor key := range renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, key)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(keys)\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, innerKey := range keys {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key][innerKey], fmt.Sprintf(\" %q\", innerKey), opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSetBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tsetOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tsetOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.SetBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsListBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.ListBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedBlocks > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\\n%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"block\", unchangedBlocks, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s}\", formatIndent(indent), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts)))\n\treturn buf.String()\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/block.go",
    "numLines": 198,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 198
  },
  "type": "text"
}
5. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp\"\n\t\"github.com/mitchellh/colorstring\"\n\t\"github.com/zclconf/go-cty/cty\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nfunc TestRenderers_Human(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolorize := colorstring.Colorize{\n\t\tColors:  colorstring.DefaultColors,\n\t\tDisable: true,\n\t}\n\n\ttcs := map[string]struct {\n\t\tdiff     computed.Diff\n\t\texpected string\n\t\topts     computed.RenderHumanOpts\n\t}{\n\t\t// We're using the string \"null\" in these tests to demonstrate the\n\t\t// difference between rendering an actual string and rendering a null\n\t\t// value.\n\t\t\"primitive_create_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"null\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\"\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_delete_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"null\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\" -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_string_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"null\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\" -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"null\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null -> \\\"null\\\"\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_multiline_string_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"nu\\nll\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n      - nu\n      - ll\n      + null\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_multiline_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"nu\\nll\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n      - null\n      + nu\n      + ll\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_json_string_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"[null]\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n        [\n          - null,\n        ]\n    ) -> null\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_json_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"[null]\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\nnull -> jsonencode(\n        [\n          + null,\n        ]\n    )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_create_fake_json\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"[\\\"hello\\\"] and some more\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\"[\\\"hello\\\"] and some more\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_create_null_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_delete_null_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_create\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_delete\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"1 -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_delete_override\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\topts:     computed.RenderHumanOpts{OverrideNullSuffix: true},\n\t\t\texpected: \"1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"1 -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null -> 1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"0 -> 1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_long_float\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"123456789\"), json.Number(\"987654321\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"123456789 -> 987654321\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_long_float_with_decimals\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1.23456789\"), json.Number(\"9.87654321\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"1.23456789 -> 9.87654321\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_create_very_long_float\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"9223372036854773256\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"9223372036854773256\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_replace\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\tReplace:  true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"0 -> 1 # forces replacement\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_multiline_string_create\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"hello\\nworld\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n        hello\n        world\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_multiline_string_delete\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"hello\\nworld\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n        hello\n        world\n    EOT -> null\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_multiline_string_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"hello\\nold\\nworld\", \"hello\\nnew\\nworld\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n        hello\n      - old\n      + new\n        world\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_string_create\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n        {\n          + key_one = \"value_one\"\n          + key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_string_delete\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n        {\n          - key_one = \"value_one\"\n          - key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    ) -> null\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_string_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", \"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\",\\\"key_three\\\":\\\"value_three\\\"}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n      ~ {\n          + key_three = \"value_three\"\n            # (2 unchanged attributes hidden)\n        }\n    )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_explicit_nulls\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key_one\\\":\\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", \"{\\\"key_one\\\":null}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n      ~ {\n          ~ key_one = \"value_one\" -> null\n          - key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_fake_json_string_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t// This isn't valid JSON, our renderer should be okay with it.\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"\", \"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\",\\\"key_three\\\":\\\"value_three\\\"\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"{\\\\\\\"key_one\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"value_one\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"key_two\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"value_two\\\\\\\"\\\" -> \\\"{\\\\\\\"key_one\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"value_one\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"key_two\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"value_two\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"key_three\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"value_three\\\\\\\"\\\"\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_multiline_to_json_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"hello\\nworld\", \"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n        hello\n        world\n    EOT -> jsonencode(\n        {\n          + key_one = \"value_one\"\n          + key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_to_multiline_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", \"hello\\nworld\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n        {\n          - key_one = \"value_one\"\n          - key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    ) -> <<-EOT\n        hello\n        world\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_to_string_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", \"hello world\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n        {\n          - key_one = \"value_one\"\n          - key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    ) -> \"hello world\"\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_string_to_json_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"hello world\", \"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n\"hello world\" -> jsonencode(\n        {\n          + key_one = \"value_one\"\n          + key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_multi_to_single_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"key:two\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"number\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"old\", \"new\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n{\n      ~ list_blocks \"key:two\" {\n          - number = 1 -> null\n          ~ string = \"old\" -> \"new\"\n        }\n      ~ list_blocks \"key_one\" {\n          ~ number = 1 -> 2\n          + string = \"new\"\n        }\n    }\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"sensitive_block\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: SensitiveBlock(computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(nil, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t}, true, true),\n\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n{\n      # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n      # so its contents will not be displayed.\n    }\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"delete_empty_block\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(nil, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"{}\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"block_escapes_keys\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"attribute_one\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), json.Number(\"2\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"attribute:two\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"2\"), json.Number(\"3\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"attribute_six\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"3\"), json.Number(\"4\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{\n\t\t\t\t\tSingleBlocks: map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block:one\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"one\", \"four\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_two\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"two\", \"three\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n{\n      ~ \"attribute:two\" = 2 -> 3\n      ~ attribute_one   = 1 -> 2\n      ~ attribute_six   = 3 -> 4\n\n      ~ \"nested_block:one\" {\n          ~ string = \"one\" -> \"four\"\n        }\n\n      ~ nested_block_two {\n          ~ string = \"two\" -> \"three\"\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"block_always_includes_important_attributes\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"root\", \"root\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"boolean\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(false, false, cty.Bool),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{\n\t\t\t\t\tSingleBlocks: map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"one\", \"one\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_two\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"two\", \"two\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\tAction: plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n{\n        id      = \"root\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n\n        # (2 unchanged blocks hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"output_map_to_list\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: TypeChange(computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Map(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"element_one\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"element_two\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t\t}, computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: List([]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"0\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n{\n      - \"element_one\" = 0\n      - \"element_two\" = 1\n    } -> [\n      + 0,\n      + 1,\n    ]\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"json_string_no_symbols\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key\\\":\\\"value\\\"}\", \"{\\\"key\\\":\\\"value\\\"}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\topts: computed.RenderHumanOpts{\n\t\t\t\tHideDiffActionSymbols: true,\n\t\t\t\tShowUnchangedChildren: true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n    {\n        key = \"value\"\n    }\n)\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor name, tc := range tcs {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\n\t\t\topts := tc.opts.Clone()\n\t\t\topts.Colorize = &colorize\n\n\t\t\texpected := strings.TrimSpace(tc.expected)\n\t\t\tactual := tc.diff.RenderHuman(0, opts)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(expected, actual); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", expected, actual, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go",
    "numLines": 2240,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 2240
  },
  "type": "text"
}

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go",
  "limit": 100
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage jsonformat\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp\"\n\t\"github.com/mitchellh/colorstring\"\n\t\"github.com/zclconf/go-cty/cty\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/addrs\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/differ\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/structured\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/structured/attribute_path\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonplan\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonprovider\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/configs/configschema\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/providers\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/states\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/terminal\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/terraform\"\n)\n\nfunc TestRenderHuman_EmptyPlan(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\tstreams, done := terminal.StreamsForTesting(t)\n\n\tplan := Plan{}\n\n\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color, Streams: streams}\n\tplan.renderHuman(renderer, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\twant := `\nNo changes. Your infrastructure matches the configuration.\n\nTerraform has compared your real infrastructure against your configuration\nand found no differences, so no changes are needed.\n`\n\n\tgot := done(t).Stdout()\n\tif diff := cmp.Diff(want, got); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected output\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\", got, want, diff)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestRenderHuman_DeferredPlan(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\tstreams, done := terminal.StreamsForTesting(t)\n\n\tplan := Plan{\n\t\tDeferredChanges: []jsonplan.DeferredResourceChange{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tReason: jsonplan.DeferredReasonDeferredPrereq,\n\t\t\t\tResourceChange: jsonplan.ResourceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\tAddress:      \"aws_instance.foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tMode:         \"managed\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         \"aws_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tIndexUnknown: true,\n\t\t\t\t\tProviderName: \"aws\",\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: jsonplan.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tActions: []string{\"update\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tProviderSchemas: map[string]*jsonprovider.Provider{\n\t\t\t\"aws\": {\n\t\t\t\tResourceSchemas: map[string]*jsonprovider.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"aws_instance\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: &jsonprovider.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*jsonprovider.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributeType: marshalJson(t, \"string\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributeType: marshalJson(t, \"string\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color, Streams: streams}",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go",
    "numLines": 100,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 8169
  },
  "type": "text"

12. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/diff.go"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage computed\n\nimport (\n\t\"github.com/mitchellh/colorstring\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\n// Diff captures the computed diff for a single block, element or attribute.\n//\n// It essentially merges common functionality across all types of changes,\n// namely the replace logic and the action / change type. Any remaining\n// behaviour can be offloaded to the renderer which will be unique for the\n// various change types (eg. maps, objects, lists, blocks, primitives, etc.).\ntype Diff struct {\n\t// Renderer captures the uncommon functionality across the different kinds\n\t// of changes. Each type of change (lists, blocks, sets, etc.) will have a\n\t// unique renderer.\n\tRenderer DiffRenderer\n\n\t// Action is the action described by this change (such as create, delete,\n\t// update, etc.).\n\tAction plans.Action\n\n\t// Replace tells the Change that it should add the `# forces replacement`\n\t// suffix.\n\t//\n\t// Every single change could potentially add this suffix, so we embed it in\n\t// the change as common functionality instead of in the specific renderers.\n\tReplace bool\n}\n\n// NewDiff creates a new Diff object with the provided renderer, action and\n// replace context.\nfunc NewDiff(renderer DiffRenderer, action plans.Action, replace bool) Diff {\n\treturn Diff{\n\t\tRenderer: renderer,\n\t\tAction:   action,\n\t\tReplace:  replace,\n\t}\n}\n\n// RenderHuman prints the Change into a human-readable string referencing the\n// specified RenderOpts.\n//\n// If the returned string is a single line, then indent should be ignored.\n//\n// If the return string is multiple lines, then indent should be used to offset\n// the beginning of all lines but the first by the specified amount.\nfunc (diff Diff) RenderHuman(indent int, opts RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\treturn diff.Renderer.RenderHuman(diff, indent, opts)\n}\n\n// WarningsHuman returns a list of strings that should be rendered as warnings\n// before a given change is rendered.\n//\n// As with the RenderHuman function, the indent should only be applied on\n// multiline warnings and on the second and following lines.\nfunc (diff Diff) WarningsHuman(indent int, opts RenderHumanOpts) []string {\n\treturn diff.Renderer.WarningsHuman(diff, indent, opts)\n}\n\ntype DiffRenderer interface {\n\tRenderHuman(diff Diff, indent int, opts RenderHumanOpts) string\n\tWarningsHuman(diff Diff, indent int, opts RenderHumanOpts) []string\n}\n\n// RenderHumanOpts contains options that can control how the human render\n// function of the DiffRenderer will function.\ntype RenderHumanOpts struct {\n\tColorize *colorstring.Colorize\n\n\t// OverrideNullSuffix tells the Renderer not to display the `-> null` suffix\n\t// that is normally displayed when an element, attribute, or block is\n\t// deleted.\n\tOverrideNullSuffix bool\n\n\t// ForceForcesReplacement tells the Renderer to display the\n\t// `# forces replacement` suffix, even if a diff doesn't have the Replace\n\t// field set.\n\t//\n\t// Some renderers (like the Set renderer) don't display the suffix\n\t// themselves but force their child diffs to display it instead.\n\tForceForcesReplacement bool\n\n\t// ForbidForcesReplacement is the opposite of ForceForcesReplacement. It\n\t// tells the Renderer to not display the '# forces replacement' suffix, even\n\t// if a diff does have the Replace field set.\n\t//\n\t// Some renderers (like the Unknown renderer) want to capture the\n\t// forceReplacement setting at their level instead of within the children.\n\tForbidForcesReplacement bool\n\n\t// ShowUnchangedChildren instructs the Renderer to render all children of a\n\t// given complex change, instead of hiding unchanged items and compressing\n\t// them into a single line.\n\tShowUnchangedChildren bool\n\n\t// HideDiffActionSymbols tells the renderer not to show the '+'/'-' symbols\n\t// and to skip the places where the symbols would result in an offset.\n\tHideDiffActionSymbols bool\n}\n\n// NewRenderHumanOpts creates a new RenderHumanOpts struct with the required\n// fields set.\nfunc NewRenderHumanOpts(colorize *colorstring.Colorize) RenderHumanOpts {\n\treturn RenderHumanOpts{\n\t\tColorize: colorize,\n\t}\n}\n\n// Clone returns a new RenderOpts object, that matches the original but can be\n// edited without changing the original.\nfunc (opts RenderHumanOpts) Clone() RenderHumanOpts {\n\treturn RenderHumanOpts{\n\t\tColorize: opts.Colorize,\n\n\t\tOverrideNullSuffix:    opts.OverrideNullSuffix,\n\t\tShowUnchangedChildren: opts.ShowUnchangedChildren,\n\t\tHideDiffActionSymbols: opts.HideDiffActionSymbols,\n\n\t\t// ForceForcesReplacement and ForbidForcesReplacement are special cases\n\t\t// in that they don't cascade. So each diff should decide independently\n\t\t// whether it's direct children should override their internal Replace\n\t\t// logic, instead of an ancestor making the switch and affecting the\n\t\t// entire tree.\n\t\tForceForcesReplacement:  false,\n\t\tForbidForcesReplacement: false,\n\t}\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/diff.go",
    "numLines": 134,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 134
  },
  "type": "text"
}

}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)\n\nfunc Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &unknownRenderer{\n\t\tbefore: before,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype unknownRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tbefore computed.Diff\n}\n\nfunc (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif diff.Action == plans.Create {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tbeforeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.\n\tbeforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true\n\tif diff.Replace {\n\t\t// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown\n\t\t// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.\n\t\tbeforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true\n\t}\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s -> (known after apply)%s\", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go",
    "numLines": 43,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 43
  },
  "type": "text"
}

  "new_string": "func (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif diff.Action == plans.Create {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\t// If renderer.before.Renderer is nil (e.g., when transitioning from null),\n\t// treat it like a Create action.\n\tif renderer.before.Renderer == nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tbeforeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.\n\tbeforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true\n\tif diff.Replace {\n\t\t// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown\n\t\t// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.\n\t\tbeforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true\n\t}\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s -> (known after apply)%s\", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n}",

  "replace_all": false
}

Input
{

  "offset": 150
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "\t\tswitch {\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSingleBlock(key):\n\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.SingleBlocks[key], \"\", opts)\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsMapBlock(key):\n\t\t\tvar keys []string\n\t\t\tfor key := range renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, key)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(keys)\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, innerKey := range keys {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key][innerKey], fmt.Sprintf(\" %q\", innerKey), opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSetBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tsetOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tsetOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.SetBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsListBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.ListBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/block.go",
    "numLines": 40,
    "startLine": 150,
    "totalLines": 198
  },
  "type": "text"
}

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/block.go",
  "newString": "renderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)",
  "oldString": "renderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)",
  "originalFile": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\t_ computed.DiffRenderer = (*blockRenderer)(nil)\n\n\timportantAttributes = []string{\n\t\t\"id\",\n\t\t\"name\",\n\t\t\"tags\",\n\t}\n)\n\nfunc importantAttribute(attr string) bool {\n\tfor _, attribute := range importantAttributes {\n\t\tif attribute == attr {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc Block(attributes map[string]computed.Diff, blocks Blocks) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &blockRenderer{\n\t\tattributes: attributes,\n\t\tblocks:     blocks,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype blockRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tattributes map[string]computed.Diff\n\tblocks     Blocks\n}\n\nfunc (renderer blockRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif len(renderer.attributes) == 0 && len(renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()) == 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"{}%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tunchangedAttributes := 0\n\tunchangedBlocks := 0\n\n\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen := 0\n\tvar attributeKeys []string\n\tescapedAttributeKeys := make(map[string]string)\n\tfor key := range renderer.attributes {\n\t\tattributeKeys = append(attributeKeys, key)\n\t\tescapedKey := EnsureValidAttributeName(key)\n\t\tescapedAttributeKeys[key] = escapedKey\n\t\tif maximumAttributeKeyLen < len(escapedKey) {\n\t\t\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen = len(escapedKey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tsort.Strings(attributeKeys)\n\n\timportantAttributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\timportantAttributeOpts.ShowUnchangedChildren = true\n\n\tattributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"{%s\\n\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts)))\n\tfor _, key := range attributeKeys {\n\t\tattribute := renderer.attributes[key]\n\t\tif importantAttribute(key) {\n\n\t\t\t// Always display the important attributes.\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, importantAttributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, key, attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts)))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif attribute.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\tunchangedAttributes++\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, opts) {\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t}\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, attributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, escapedAttributeKeys[key], attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, attributeOpts)))\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedAttributes > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"attribute\", unchangedAttributes, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tblockKeys := renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()\n\tfor _, key := range blockKeys {\n\n\t\tfoundChangedBlock := false\n\t\trenderBlock := func(diff computed.Diff, mapKey string, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) {\n\n\t\t\tcreatingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Create && renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tdeletingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Delete && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tmodifyingSensitiveValue := (diff.Action == plans.Update || diff.Action == plans.NoOp) && (renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] || renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key])\n\n\t\t\tif creatingSensitiveValue || deletingSensitiveValue || modifyingSensitiveValue {\n\t\t\t\t// Intercept the renderer here if the sensitive data was set\n\t\t\t\t// across all the blocks instead of individually.\n\t\t\t\taction := diff.Action\n\t\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key] != renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\t\taction = plans.Update\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tdiff = computed.NewDiff(SensitiveBlock(diff, renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key], renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]), action, diff.Replace)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\t\tunchangedBlocks++\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !foundChangedBlock && len(renderer.attributes) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t// We always want to put an extra new line between the\n\t\t\t\t// attributes and blocks, and between groups of blocks.\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\t\t\t\tfoundChangedBlock = true\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// If the force replacement metadata was set for every entry in the\n\t\t\t// block we need to override that here. Our child blocks will only\n\t\t\t// know about the replace function if it was set on them\n\t\t\t// specifically, and not if it was set for all the blocks.\n\t\t\tblockOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tblockOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = renderer.blocks.ReplaceBlocks[key]\n\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range diff.WarningsHuman(indent+1, blockOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s%s %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(diff.Action, blockOpts), EnsureValidAttributeName(key), mapKey, diff.RenderHuman(indent+1, blockOpts)))\n\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch {\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSingleBlock(key):\n\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.SingleBlocks[key], \"\", opts)\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsMapBlock(key):\n\t\t\tvar keys []string\n\t\t\tfor key := range renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, key)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(keys)\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, innerKey := range keys {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key][innerKey], fmt.Sprintf(\" %q\", innerKey), opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSetBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tsetOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tsetOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.SetBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsListBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.ListBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedBlocks > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\\n%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"block\", unchangedBlocks, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s}\", formatIndent(indent), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts)))\n\treturn buf.String()\n}\n",

TestRenderers_Human(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolorize := colorstring.Colorize{\n\t\tColors:  colorstring.DefaultColors,\n\t\tDisable: true,\n\t}\n\n\ttcs := map[string]struct {\n\t\tdiff     computed.Diff\n\t\texpected string\n\t\topts     computed.RenderHumanOpts\n\t}{\n\t\t// We're using the string \"null\" in these tests to demonstrate the\n\t\t// difference between rendering an actual string and rendering a null\n\t\t// value.\n\t\t\"primitive_create_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"null\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction: Primitive(\"null\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\" -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"null\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null -> \\\"null\\\"\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_multiline_string_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"nu\\nll\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n      - nu\n      - ll\n      + null\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_multiline_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"nu\\nll\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n      - null\n      + nu\n      + ll\n `\n{\n        id      = \"root\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n\n        # (2 unchanged blocks hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"output_map_to_list\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: TypeChange(computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Map(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"element_one\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), {
  "command": "for line in 3506 4233 4763 5835; do\n  testname=$(awk \"NR==$line {print \\$2}\" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go)\n  count=$(awk \"NR>=$line && NR<$line+200 && /^\\s\\s\\},$/ {print NR; exit}\" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -1)\n  occurrences=$(awk \"NR>=$line && NR<$count {print}\" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep \"+ root_block_device (known after apply)\" | wc -l)\n  echo \"Test $testname (line $line): $occurrences occurrences\"\ndone"
}

  "oldString": "\t\t\"in-place update - unknown block\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-BEFORE\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"disks\": cty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.StringVal(\"/var/diska\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.StringVal(\"50GB\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.StringVal(\"gp1\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"new_field\":   cty.StringVal(\"new_value\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.StringVal(\"gp2\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"new_field\":   cty.StringVal(\"new_value\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-AFTER\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"disks\": cty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.StringVal(\"/var/diska\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.StringVal(\"50GB\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.List(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"new_field\":   cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t}))),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tSchema:          testSchemaPlus(configschema.NestingList),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ ami   = \"ami-BEFORE\" -> \"ami-AFTER\"\n        id    = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n\n      + root_block_device (known after apply)",
  "originalFile": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage jsonformat\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp\"\n\t\"github.com/mitchellh/colorstring\"\n\t\"github.com/zclconf/go-cty/cty\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/addrs\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/differ\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/structured\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/structured/attribute_path\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonplan\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonprovider\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/configs/configschema\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/providers\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/states\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/terminal\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/terraform\"\n)\n\nfunc TestRenderHuman_EmptyPlan(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\tstreams, done := terminal.StreamsForTesting(t)\n\n\tplan := Plan{}\n\n\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color, Streams: streams}\n\tplan.renderHuman(renderer, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\twant := `\nNo changes. Your infrastructure matches the configuration.\n\nTerraform has compared your real infrastructure against your configuration\nand found no differences, so no changes are needed.\n`\n\n\tgot := done(t).Stdout()\n\tif diff := cmp.Diff(want, got); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected output\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\", got, want, diff)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestRenderHuman_DeferredPlan(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\tstreams, done := terminal.StreamsForTesting(t)\n\n\tplan := Plan{\n\t\tDeferredChanges: []jsonplan.DeferredResourceChange{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tReason: jsonplan.DeferredReasonDeferredPrereq,\n\t\t\t\tResourceChange: jsonplan.ResourceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\tAddress:      \"aws_instance.foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tMode:         \"managed\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         \"aws_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tIndexUnknown: true,\n\t\t\t\t\tProviderName: \"aws\",\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: jsonplan.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tActions: []string{\"update\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tProviderSchemas: map[string]*jsonprovider.Provider{\n\t\t\t\"aws\": {\n\t\t\t\tResourceSchemas: map[string]*jsonprovider.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"aws_instance\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: &jsonprovider.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*jsonprovider.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributeType: marshalJson(t, \"string\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributeType: marshalJson(t, \"string\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color, Streams: streams}\n\tplan.renderHuman(renderer, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\twant := `\nNo current changes. This plan requires another plan to be applied first.\n\n\nNote: This is a partial plan, parts can only be known in the next plan / apply cycle.\n\n\n  # aws_instance.foo was deferred\n  # (because a prerequisite for this resource is deferred)\n  ~ resource \"aws_instance\" \"foo\" {\n        id = \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\"\n    }\n\n\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n`\n\n\tgot := done(t).Stdout()\n\tif diff := cmp.Diff(want, got); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected output\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\", got, want, diff)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestRenderHuman_EmptyOutputs(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\tstreams, done := terminal.StreamsForTesting(t)\n\n\toutputVal, _ := json.Marshal(\"some-text\")\n\tplan := Plan{\n\t\tOutputChanges: map[string]jsonplan.Change{\n\t\t\t\"a_string\": {\n\t\t\t\tActions: []string{\"no-op\"},\n\t\t\t\tBefore:  outputVal,\n\t\t\t\tAfter:   outputVal,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color, Streams: streams}\n\tplan.renderHuman(renderer, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\twant := `\nNo changes. Your infrastructure matches the configuration.\n\nTerraform has compared your real infrastructure against your configuration\nand found no differences, so no changes are needed.\n`\n\n\tgot := done(t).Stdout()\n\tif diff := cmp.Diff(want, got); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected output\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\", got, want, diff)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestRenderHuman_Imports(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\tschemas := map[string]*jsonprovider.Provider{\n\t\t\"test\": {\n\t\t\tResourceSchemas: map[string]*jsonprovider.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\"test_resource\": {\n\t\t\t\t\tBlock: &jsonprovider.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*jsonprovider.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributeType: marshalJson(t, \"string\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributeType: marshalJson(t, \"string\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\ttcs := map[string]struct {\n\t\tplan   Plan\n\t\toutput string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"simple_import\": {\n\t\t\tplan: Plan{\n\t\t\t\tResourceChanges: []jsonplan.ResourceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddress:      \"test_resource.resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: jsonplan.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tActions: []string{\"no-op\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":
