        Bash Commands (76)
        
1. $ find /workspace -name "unknown.go" -o -name "block.go" -o -name "renderer_test.go" -o -name "plan_test.go" | grep -E "(unknown|block|renderer_test|plan_test)" | head -20
2. $ go test ./internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/... -v 2>&1 | head -100
3. $ grep -n "computed_update_from_null" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go
4. $ grep -n "unknown.*update" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go
5. $ grep -n "UnknownBlocks\|unknown_blocks\|known after apply" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -30
6. $ find /workspace -name "computed.go" | head -5
7. $ grep -r "type Diff struct" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/ | head -5
8. $ grep -B5 -A5 "UnknownBlocks\[" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -50
9. $ grep -n "UnknownBlocks" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
10. $ grep -n "UnknownBlocks" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/block.go
11. $ grep -n "func Test.*Unknown\|func Test.*Block" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
12. $ grep -n "func Test" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
13. $ awk '/^func Test/{test=$0} /\+ id.*known after apply/{print NR": "test}' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -20
14. $ grep -n "\"unknown_" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go | head -20
15. $ grep -n "unknown" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go | head -20
16. $ grep -n "expected:" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go | tail -20
17. $ grep -n "UnknownBlocks\[" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -20
18. $ grep -n -B5 -A5 "\"UnknownBlocks\": {" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -50
19. $ grep -n "dynamic\|for_each\|nested" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -i test | head -20
20. $ grep -n "(known after apply)" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep "^\s*+" | head -20
21. $ grep -B2 -A2 "^\s*\+" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -B2 -A2 "known after apply" | head -50
22. $ grep -n "for_each\|dynamic" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -10
23. $ awk '/^func TestResourceChange_nestedMap/,/^func Test|^}$/ {print NR": "$0}' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -i "dynamic\|unknown\|after apply" | head -30
24. $ grep -n "^\s*+\s[a-z_]*\s{\|^\s*+\s[a-z_]*\s(known after apply)" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -30
25. $ awk 'NR==3500 || NR==3501 || NR==3502 || NR==3503 || NR==3504 || NR==3505 || NR==3506' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
26. $ grep -n '"in-place update.*unknown' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
27. $ for line in 3551 4230 4278 4808 4867 5832; do
  echo "Line $line:"
  awk "NR>=$line && NR<=$((line+2))" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
  echo
done
28. $ for testline in 3506 4233 4289 4763 4819 5835; do
  echo "Test at line $testline:"
  awk "NR>=$testline && NR<=$((testline+1))" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -2
  echo
done
29. $ awk 'NR>=4233 && NR<=4340' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -120
30. $ grep -r "writeDiffActionSymbol" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/ | head -5
31. $ grep -A20 "func writeDiffActionSymbol" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/util.go
32. $ grep -r "DiffActionSymbol" /workspace/internal/ | grep "func DiffActionSymbol"
33. $ grep -A10 "func DiffActionSymbol" /workspace/internal/command/format/format.go
34. $ grep -A15 "func DiffActionSymbol" /workspace/internal/command/format/format.go
35. $ grep -A20 "func DiffActionSymbol" /workspace/internal/command/format/format.go
36. $ grep -n "in-place update - unknown block" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -v "with replace"
37. $ for line in 3506 4233 4763 5835; do
  testname=$(awk "NR==$line {print \$2}" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go)
  count=$(awk "NR>=$line && NR<$line+200 && /^\s\s\},$/ {print NR; exit}" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -1)
  occurrences=$(awk "NR>=$line && NR<$count {print}" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep "+ root_block_device (known after apply)" | wc -l)
  echo "Test $testname (line $line): $occurrences occurrences"
done
38. $ grep -B1 "NestingList\|NestingSet\|NestingMap" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -A1 "testSchema.*Nesting" | head -30
39. $ awk '/^func TestResourceChange_nestedList/,/^func Test|^}$/' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -n '"in-place update - unknown' | head -10
40. $ grep -n '+ root_block_device (known after apply)' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
41. $ for line in 4337 4760 7811 7851; do
  echo "Checking line $line:"
  awk "NR>=$((line-100)) && NR<=$line" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -E "(Action:|\".*block)" | tail -5
  echo
done
42. $ for line in 3503 3551 3610 4230 4278 4337 4760 4808 4867 5832 7811 7851; do
  testline=$(awk "NR<=$line && /\".*unknown block" {lastline=NR; lasttext=\$0} END {print lastline}" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go)
  action=$(awk "NR>=$testline && NR<=$testline+5 && /Action:/ {print; exit}" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go)
  echo "Line $line: $action"
done
43. $ awk 'NR>=4320 && NR<=4340' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
44. $ awk '/(^func Test|^\s+\+ root_block_device \(known after apply\))/{
  if (/^func Test/) testname = $2;
  if (/\+ root_block_device/) print NR": "testname
}' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
45. $ sed -n '5832p' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
46. $ sed -n '5825,5836p' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
47. $ grep -n 'in-place update - unknown block' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -v "with replace"
48. $ grep -n "\".*unknown block" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
49. $ sed -n '5835,5875p' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep "+ root_block_device"
50. $ sed -n '5864,5875p' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
51. $ grep -n '"in-place update - unknown block with replace"' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
52. $ for line in 3562 4289 4819 5876; do
  action=$(sed -n "$((line)),/^[[:space:]]*Action:/p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep Action | head -1)
  echo "Line $line: $action"
done
53. $ for line in 3551 4230 4278 4808 4867 5832; do
  # Find the test case for this line
  testline=$(awk "NR<=$line && /\"in-place (create|update)" {testline=NR; testtext=\$0} END {if(testline) print testline}" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go)
  if [ -n "$testline" ]; then
    action=$(sed -n "$((testline)),$((testline+10))p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep "Action:" | head -1)
    echo "Line $line: $action"
  fi
done
54. $ for line in 3506 4233 4763; do
  count=$(sed -n "$((line)),$((line+70))p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -c "+ root_block_device (known after apply)\|~ root_block_device (known after apply)")
  echo "Test at line $line: $count occurrences of root_block_device (known after apply)"
done
55. $ for line in 3562 4289 4819; do
  echo "Checking test at line $line:"
  sed -n "$((line)),$((line+70))p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep "+ root_block_device (known after apply)" | head -1
  echo
done
56. $ grep -c '      + root_block_device (known after apply)' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
57. $ grep -n '      + root_block_device (known after apply)' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | while read line_num _; do
  testline=$(awk "NR<=$((${line_num%:*})) && /\"in-place (create|update)/ {t=NR} END{print t}" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go)
  action=$(sed -n "$((testline)),/Action:/p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep Action | head -1 | awk '{print $NF}' | sed 's/,$//')
  echo "${line_num}: $action"
done

71. $ find /workspace -name "*plan_test.go" -path "*/jsonformat/*"
72. $ for line in 3551 4278 4808; do
  nesting=$(sed -n "1,$((line))p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -o "Nesting[A-Z]*" | tail -1)
  echo "Line $line: $nesting"
done
73. $ for line in 3551 4278 4808; do
  nesting=$(sed -n "1,$((line))p" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep "Nesting[A-Za-z]*" | tail -1)
  echo "Line $line: $nesting"
done
74. $ echo "=== Changes in unknown.go ===" && grep -A7 "If renderer.before.Renderer is nil" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go && echo && echo "=== Changes in block.go (3 locations) ===" && grep "diff.Action, false" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/block.go && echo && echo "=== Changes in renderer_test.go ===" && grep -A6 "computed_update_from_null" /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go && echo && echo "=== Changes in plan_test.go (3 locations) ===" && grep -n '~ root_block_device (known after apply)' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
75. $ grep -B2 '+ root_block_device (known after apply)' /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -E "Action:|in-place" | paste - - | grep Update
76. $ cat <<'EOF'
Summary of Changes Made:

1. unknown.go (Fix nil renderer crash):
   - Added check for nil renderer.before.Renderer to handle null-to-unknown transitions
   - Location: Lines 33-37
   
2. block.go (Use diff.Action instead of plans.Create):
   - Line 161: MapBlocks - changed plans.Create to diff.Action
   - Line 173: SetBlocks - changed plans.Create to diff.Action
   - Line 182: ListBlocks - changed plans.Create to diff.Action
   
3. renderer_test.go (Add test case):
   - Added "computed_update_from_null" test case after line 2224
   - Tests unknown renderer with nil renderer.before
   
4. plan_test.go (Update test expectations):
   - Line 3551: NestingList update - "+" changed to "~"
   - Line 4278: NestingSet update - "+" changed to "~"  
   - Line 4808: NestingMap update - "+" changed to "~"

All changes maintain the repository code style and conventions.
EOF
